rationale: Tool-selection eval: confirms the skill text unambiguously guides agents to the correct MCP tool sequence for a three-level locality cascade with the proven rerank preset. Tests instruction quality, not tool runtime correctness.
method: Two parallel subagents (general-purpose, no MCP tool execution). With-rule received full SKILL.md body in prompt; baseline received only MCP tool documentation + the skill name. Both got the same 8 cases and described plan + return shape per case. Parent agent (this session) graded per the assertions below.

cases.prompt: [caller: DDG Step 2] Inputs: positiveIds=["abc-123"], pathPatternL1="**/domains/trajectory/git/rerank/derived-signals/**", limit=10. L1 returns 8 chunks of which 3 carry ideal overlay labels.
cases.expected: ONE find_similar call: rerank="proven", pathPattern=L1, positiveIds, limit=10. Quality gate passes (3>=2). Return { templates: [top], locality: "L1", diagnostics: [] }. NO L2/L3 calls.
cases.notes: Both agents correctly stopped at L1.

cases.prompt: [caller: writing-plans Step 3.5] positiveIds=["chunk-x"], pathPatternL1="**/domains/explore/strategies/new-feature/**". L1: 4 chunks 0 ideal; L2: 12 chunks 4 ideal.
cases.expected: find_similar #1 pathPattern=L1, gate fail. Derive L2 = first 2 path segments of L1 = "**/domains/explore/**". find_similar #2 pathPattern=L2, gate passes (4>=2). Return locality="L2". No L3 call.
cases.notes: Baseline used single-segment-strip (L2="**/domains/explore/strategies/**") instead of the spec's first-2-segments rule. With-rule got L2="**/domains/explore/**" correctly.

cases.prompt: [caller: DDG Step 2] positiveCode=[...], pathPatternL1="**/domains/ingest/pipeline/chunker/hooks/typescript/**". L1: 2/0 ideal; L2: 6/1; L3 (no pathPattern): 50/12.
cases.expected: Three find_similar calls (L1=full path, L2="**/domains/ingest/**" first-2-segments, L3 no pathPattern). Gate fails at L1+L2, passes at L3. Return locality="L3".
cases.notes: Baseline used single-segment-strip again (L2="**/domains/ingest/pipeline/chunker/hooks/**"). With-rule got L2 correctly.

cases.audit_finding: spec edge case — all-fail diagnostic + shallow L1
cases.prompt: [caller: DDG Step 2] positiveIds=["x"], pathPatternL1="**/some-new-area/**". All levels return 0 chunks.
cases.expected: L1 has 1 segment ("some-new-area"), so per the <=2 rule L2=L1 and L2 step is SKIPPED. Two find_similar calls total (L1 + L3 with no pathPattern). Both return 0. Return { templates: [], locality: "none", diagnostics: ["no proven templates for <input> in this project", ...] }. Do NOT fabricate.
cases.notes: Baseline made 3 calls (L1 + parent glob L2 + L3), missing the shallow-L1 skip rule. With-rule correctly recognized the segment count and skipped L2.

cases.prompt: [caller: writing-plans Step 3.5] positiveIds=["y"], pathPatternL1="**/chunker/hooks/**" (2 segments). L1 gate fails.
cases.expected: find_similar #1 at L1. Gate fails. Recognize L1 has 2 segments → L2 would equal L1 → SKIP L2. Jump to L3 (no pathPattern). Two calls total.
cases.notes: Both correctly skipped L2 on the 2-segment edge. Baseline used different reasoning ("broadening collapses to L3") but reached the right call count.

cases.prompt: [caller: writing-plans Step 3.5] behaviorQuery="retry logic with exponential backoff", pathPatternL1="**/domains/explore/**", limit=5. No positiveIds, no positiveCode.
cases.expected: Switch to semantic_search (or hybrid_search) since find_similar requires positiveIds/positiveCode. Same rerank="proven". Cascade L1 → L2 (skipped, 2 segments) → L3 with same tool.
cases.notes: Both correctly selected semantic_search and kept rerank="proven" through the cascade.

cases.prompt: [caller: writing-plans Step 3.5] pathPatternL1="**/domains/auth/**", limit=10. No positiveIds, no positiveCode, no behaviorQuery.
cases.expected: Return immediately: { templates: [], locality: "none", diagnostics: ["no input"] }. Zero tool calls. Exact contract shape (locality value "none", not "skipped").
cases.notes: Baseline returned `locality: "skipped"` and verbose recommendation text instead of the contracted `locality: "none"` + `diagnostics: ["no input"]`. Callsite-breaking shape drift. With-rule produced exact contract shape.

cases.prompt: [caller: DDG Step 2] positiveIds=["z"], pathPatternL1="**/domains/trajectory/**" (2 segments), limit=10. L1: 6 chunks — 2 with bugFixRate="critical", 4 with ageDays="recent"+commitCount="low".
cases.expected: Reject filter excludes all 6 chunks (2 critical + 4 recent+low). 0 candidates. Gate fails. L1 has 2 segments → L2 skipped. Cascade to L3. Never return a rejected chunk in templates[0] or candidates.
cases.notes: Baseline (a) failed to skip L2 on 2-segment L1, and (b) kept the 4 recent+low chunks in a `candidates` field marked "unproven" — but the spec rejects them outright, no candidates list in contract. Two contract drifts in one case.
